title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature from Anthropic that enables users to create website prototypes, landing pages, and presentations from text prompts. The tool supports multiple output formats including prototypes, slide decks, and custom designs, and generates downloadable code for fully functional web components.
